a:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Temporal Knowledge Graph"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The graph structure underlying Semantic Memory, enabling relationship traversal and time-aware queries."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Graph Structure"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\ngraph LR\n  A[Alice] -->|prefers_language| B[Go]\n  A -->|works_on| C[Project Alpha]\n  C -->|has_deadline| D[2026-05-01]\n  C -->|depends_on| E[Auth Service]\n  E -->|maintained_by| F[Bob]\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Temporal Dimensions"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Every edge has temporal metadata:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}]}],": When the relationship became true"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]}],": When it ceased being true (NULL = current)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"confidence"}]}],": How certain we are about this fact"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]}],": Which memory entry this was extracted from"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Query Patterns"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Direct Neighbors"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Who works on Project Alpha?\nmem.query_facts(predicate=\"works_on\", object=\"Project Alpha\")\n# &gt; Alice\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Path Traversal"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# What services does Project Alpha depend on (2 hops)?\nmem.traverse(subject=\"Project Alpha\", depth=2)\n# &gt; Auth Service &gt; Bob (maintainer)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Temporal Filtering"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# What were Alice's preferences as of March 1?\nmem.query_facts(\n  subject=\"Alice\",\n  predicate=\"prefers_language\",\n  at_time=\"2026-03-01\",\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Graph Statistics"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"stats = mem.graph_stats()\nprint(f\"Entities: {stats.entity_count}\")\nprint(f\"Relationships: {stats.edge_count}\")\nprint(f\"Predicates: {stats.predicate_count}\")\nprint(f\"Coverage: {stats.temporal_coverage}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Implementation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The graph is stored in SQLite with:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Nodes table"}],": Entity lookup and deduplication"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Edges table"}],": Triples with temporal validity"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Indices"}],": Subject, predicate, object, and time-range indexes"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"No external graph database required."}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Performance Tip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Graph queries are fast for shallow traversals (1–3 hops). Deep traversals (5+ hops) may require optimization. Consider materializing common paths if your use case requires deep graph walks."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/06qv3~~e._cb6.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0ch_p3vkb0uw2.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0pqew2nbfoy2f.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/07.05twov8012.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/113wy2s~ukj5p.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0se1rt9lzyib_.js","async":true}],"$L5","$L6","$L7"],"$L8"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"QQSqVRZ0L1fJQFST1lZ0f"}
